achievements: Indian Degree of Critical Care Medicine
professional_summary: Dr. Anjali Khalane is an experienced Pulmonologist with a specialization in Respiratory Medicine, known for her expertise in handling complex medical cases with an empathetic approach. She has a strong background in research and critical care, and offers comprehensive services including spirometry testing, Sleep Lab, Pulmonary Function Test, Chest X-ray, and pathology lab. Her professionalism and patient-centered care have earned her high recommendations.
